LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: ANDRA YOUNG'S PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER'S PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN, WHICH IS UNOPPOSED, IS GRANTED EXCEPT THAT THE ATTORNEY'S FEES REQUEST IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO IDENTIFY AUTHORITY (CONTRACT OR STATUTE) AUTHORIZING A FEE AWARD AND FAILURE TO PROVIDE EVIDENTIARY SUPPORT FOR AMOUNT OF REQUEST. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: JOSEPH QUINN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: ANDRA YOUNG's Petition For Release Of Property From Lien.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner's petition for release of property from lien, which is unopposed, is GRANTED EXCEPT THAT the attorney's fees request is denied for failure to identify authority (contract or statute) authorizing a fee award and failure to provide evidentiary support for amount of request.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
